title: The Data Detective 🕵️♂️
description: A rogue employee deleted important records. Use your SQL skills to find the missing data!
story: You arrive at the office on Monday morning. Your manager is panicking. 'Someone deleted the prices for our best-selling products!' she yells. 'We need to find out which products have missing prices so we can fix them before the store opens.'

tasks.title: Investigate the missing data
tasks.description: Write a query to find all products where the price is missing (NULL). Return ONLY the product `name`.
tasks.instruction: Select the `name` column from the `products` table where the `price` is NULL.
